mano_cua.result_summary: 中文输入法(IME)持续拦截debug panel的C键盘快捷键，无法通过debug panel成功触发clickCell move。直接点击clickCell()行未产生可见效果（无状态变化、无控制台错误），但无法确认点击是否真正触发了move调用
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Chinese IME intercepted C key needed to execute clickCell() via debug panel shortcut. Multiple attempts to switch IME to English mode failed. Direct clicks on clickCell() row produced no state changes and no console errors. Could not conclusively verify whether debug panel moves are disallowed with local master.
